scenario.name: S2-200-callers-MOH-hold
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: target <sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp-S2 Subject: S2-PoT Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: target <sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp-S2 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: target <sip:100@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Contact: <sip:caller-[call_number]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp-S2 Content-Length: 0
